_meta.name: Generic Vuetify Interaction Patterns
_meta.description: Framework-specific patterns for Vuetify 3 apps. CoWork uses this layer to generate correct payloads for any Vuetify app without site-specific knowledge. Self-improves as more Vuetify apps are encountered.

inputResolution.description: Vuetify inputs rarely have ARIA labels. Resolution uses the v-label element inside the same v-input container.
inputResolution.algorithm: Walk up from input to nearest .v-input or .v-field ancestor. Find .v-label text within that ancestor. Score against name_contains.
inputResolution.jsResolution: function resolveVuetifyInput(nameTerms) { return [...document.querySelectorAll('.v-input, .v-field')].map(container => { const label = container.querySelector('.v-label, .v-field-label'); const input = container.querySelector('input, textarea'); if (!label || !input) return null; const labelText = label.textContent.trim().toLowerCase(); const score = nameTerms.filter(t => labelText.includes(t.toLowerCase())).length * 30; return score > 0 ? { input, score, labelText } : null; }).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b) => b.score - a.score)[0]?.input ?? null; }

openSignal.description: Vuetify dialogs use .v-overlay--active class when open.

tablePatterns.description: Vuetify v-data-table patterns. Rows are <tr> elements; columns have <th> headers.
tablePatterns.actionButtonsInRow: function getRowActions(row) { return [...row.querySelectorAll('button, a[href]')].map(el => ({ text: el.textContent.trim(), ariaLabel: el.getAttribute('aria-label'), href: el.href })); }

navigationPatterns.description: Vuetify v-navigation-drawer. Links are <a> elements inside list items.

snackbarPatterns.description: Vuetify snackbar appears after successful operations. Contains confirmation text.

checkboxPattern.description: Vuetify checkboxes render as input[type=checkbox] inside .v-checkbox. Clicking the wrapper div is more reliable than clicking the input directly.

autocompletePatterns.description: Vuetify v-autocomplete / v-combobox. Type in the input, wait for dropdown, click option.

datePickerPatterns.description: Vuetify date pickers open as overlays when the date field is clicked.

knownLimitations: Vuetify inputs use generated IDs (input-v-10) that change between sessions — never cache by ID
Most buttons have no aria-label — resolve by text content only
v-overlay z-index is 2000 — overlays can obscure page content during probe operations
Vuetify's v-tooltip uses .v-overlay not [role=tooltip] for rendering
